LanguageData.USAC_Recruit.label: Civilian Assistant
LanguageData.USAC_Recruit.description: A civilian collaborator temporarily attached to USAC logistics and support duties under supervision.
LanguageData.USAC_CivilianAide.label: Civilian Aide
LanguageData.USAC_CivilianAide.description: A vetted civilian helper handling structured support tasks for USAC field units.
LanguageData.USAC_CivilianCoordinator.label: Civilian Coordinator
LanguageData.USAC_CivilianCoordinator.description: A senior civilian liaison trusted to coordinate logistics, procurement, and mission-side administration.
LanguageData.USAC_Private.label: Private
LanguageData.USAC_Private.description: The first true soldier rank, formally enlisted for frontline and field operations.
LanguageData.USAC_Corporal.label: Corporal
LanguageData.USAC_Corporal.description: A frontline soldier assigned limited team-level responsibility in active operations.
LanguageData.USAC_Sergeant.label: Ceremonial Sergeant
LanguageData.USAC_Sergeant.description: A nominal endpoint title awarded for loyalty and optics; it does not grant additional command authority.
